scenarios.name: Fix protocol conformance error on a @MainActor view model
scenarios.rationale: Treatment scopes the conformance with @MainActor extension Foo: SomeProtocol (the documented isolated-conformance fix); baseline adds nonisolated to methods or wraps with Task { @MainActor in } instead of isolating the conformance.

scenarios.name: Move expensive computation off the main actor in Swift 6.2
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses @concurrent async function (Swift 6.2+) or nonisolated with Task.detached, preserves the caller's actor on return, and avoids @unchecked Sendable; baseline reaches for Task { ... } or DispatchQueue without addressing isolation/Sendable correctly.
